title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Medical Anatomy Illustration theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Medical Anatomy Illustration: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on structured layout and clear information hierarchy, technical diagram clarity and callout structure, controlled style language without losing structure.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
